title: The Flashback Returns to Dressrosa
description: Pages 9–13 focus on the flashback returns to dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Donquixote Family, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the flashback closes as Law's present battle against Doflamingo becomes a fight to honor Corazon's love and sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Corazon! You asshole, why the hell did you pre- tend to be cute this entire time!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not like I had anything...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wanted to talk to you idiots about anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Disrespect young master, will ya!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone knows it

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: He'll die before young master even gets here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Behehe! I don't give two shits! this little fucker...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: intended to drag all of us into an all out war with the marines today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's got quite the rap sheet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Augh!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Oi, young master's here!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Young Master!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: From

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's been a long six months...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: corazon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: HAA- HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: >Cough: :Cough:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You don't have any rela- lives!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Well, you can tag along with me if you want?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Marine code 01746...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I am marine HQ Lieutenant Colonel Roci- Nante...

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Donquiljote family captain Doflamingo,

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: In order to stop the calamity you were planning to unleash onto the world... I infiltrated the family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I am a marine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Sorry for lying....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I didn't want you to hate me, ya see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: What the hell is he going on about!?

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Doffy already knows all this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: enough with your shitty monologues.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Answer me two Ques- Tions!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Where is the ope ope no mi? And where is law!?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: The ope ope no mi?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: I made law eat it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: He's a devil fruit user now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: He's already made it outside the cage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: As we speak, he's probably made his way onto the marine HQ Patrol boat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: He's under their protection.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You can't lay a finger on him.

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Young Master! Actually, a short time ago,

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Marines sent out a trans- mission saying that they'd taken custody of a young boy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Why the hell didn't you speak up sooner!?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: We never thought it'd be law!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: A boy!? That's gotta be a coin- evidence!? Law is right behind me...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: We've gotta confirm this! I'm going to dispel Birdcage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Get ready for Depar- tune!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: If we can confirm this intel, our PRI- ority turns to sinking that patrol boat...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: And stealing back law!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Leave it be! What's the point of taking back law?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Damn, law... someone really must be keeping an eye out for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: One after another, angels are descending to your aid...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Now... what am I gonna do with you law?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: If he's really gone and eaten the ope ope no mi, then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I think he needs some education on how important it is he die for me!

summary: The Flashback Returns to Dressrosa advances the Dressrosa story through Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Donquixote Family, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
